impact: The daemon can stop spinning on checkbox-13, continue the active lifecycle skeleton work, and later return to the fail-closed validator only after the committed fixture has the authority-label and recrawl-cadence fields the validator requires.
summary: Replans the blocked lifecycle source-coverage fail-closed task into narrow fixture-first recovery steps and parks the repeated broad validator retry.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-13: Add a validation-only test for the extension/cancellation/refund/inspection-result source coverage report proving it fails closed for missing authority labels, missing recrawl cadence, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, credentials, traces, screenshots, downloaded documents, and uncited category claims.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
